title: Afrobeat & Caribbean Vibes
description: Tropical vibes night bringing the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music. Perfect for couples who love to move to the rhythm.

title: Jess Hilarious Comedy Show
description: Hilarious standup from Jess Hilarious. Great date night — laughter is the best aphrodisiac. Must be 21+.

title: Young the Giant: Victory Garden Tour
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Indie rock under the stars at beautiful Chastain Park. Bring a blanket, grab wine, and enjoy live music with your person.

title: LINES OF PLAY | Group Art Exhibition (30+ Artists)
description: 30+ artists exhibition celebrating the World Cup coming to Atlanta. Great cultural date night with free entry.

title: Marcia Wood Gallery Openings
description: Dual openings featuring Susan Ker-Seymer and George Long. Sophisticated, intimate art experience for couples.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top Atlanta comedians in one show. 21+ venue. Perfect for a fun, low-pressure date with guaranteed laughs.

title: Salsa Bachata Havana Nights
description: Sunday salsa and bachata session with class + social dancing. Great way to learn together and get close on the dance floor.

title: Moms Unhinged Standup Comedy
location: Wild Heaven Beer: West End Brewery & Gardens
description: Standup comedy + craft beer at one of Atlanta's best breweries. Casual, fun, no pressure — just good vibes.

title: Vegan Takeover at Kamayan
description: Vegan Filipino food takeover at one of the best Asian spots in Atlanta. Creative plant-based twists on Filipino classics. Great for adventurous foodie couples.

title: Steph Tolev at Helium Comedy Club
description: Special event comedy with Steph Tolev. Two showtimes available. A polished, fun date night option.

title: Salsa Social at Callanwolde
description: Cuban music and dancing at the historic Callanwolde Mansion. Romantic setting, great music, perfect for dancing couples.

title: Tropical Latin Night Atlanta
description: Salsa, bachata, merengue — the whole Latin dance experience. Great energy for couples who want a night out.

title: Summer Walker: Still Finally Over It Tour
description: R&B star Summer Walker live in Atlanta. Smooth vibes, amazing vocals — perfect for couples who love neo-soul and R&B.

title: Art of the Game Open Reception
description: Opening reception combining art and gaming culture. Unique, conversation-starting exhibit — ideal for couples into creative stuff.

title: Artful ATL
description: Annual celebration of Atlanta's contemporary art scene. Free admission, 50+ artists, wine — sophisticated date night.

title: YUNGBLUD: IDOLS World Tour
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Electric alt-pop performance under the open sky. For couples who like edgy, energetic music and a festival vibe.

title: DJ Maphorisa G.O.A.T Experience
description: South African amapiano headlining an afterparty. Late-night energy, premium Afrobeat and dance music. Night owls only!

title: Culture Fest Day Party - Juneteenth
description: Juneteenth celebration with great food, vibes, and community. Day party energy — perfect for couples who love good times.

title: Happy People Atlanta
description: Culture, energy, and pure vibes at Underground Atlanta. Great for couples wanting a daytime-to-evening Juneteenth experience.

title: Reggae on the Rooftop Festival
description: Juneteenth weekend rooftop reggae festival with amazing city views. Sun, reggae, good vibes — ultimate date setting.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday - Fathers Day Edition
description: Community vegan food event celebrating fathers with plant-based soul food. Great for couples who love food and community.

title: Tropical Latin Night Atlanta
description: Another Friday Latin night — salsa, bachata, and more. Great way to end the week dancing with your partner.

title: 5 Seconds of Summer: Everyone's A Star Tour
description: Pop-punk favorites live in concert. Fun, energetic show — if your partner loves 5SOS or pop-rock, it's a great date.

title: Lyle Lovett: Songs & Stories
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE
description: Intimate acoustic performance by Lyle Lovett at City Winery. Wine, storytelling, incredible musicianship — romantic date par excellence.

title: Plant To The Future: Food, Freedom & Black Futures Conference
location: Pittsburgh Yards | The Food Studio, Atlanta
description: Food, community, and Black future-focused conference. Plant-based eats, panels, networking. For couples into food justice and community.
